chapters.title: Chapter One - The Hollow at Dawn

blocks.source_text: Chapter One - The Hollow at Dawn
blocks.clean_text: Chapter One - The Hollow at Dawn

sentences.text: Chapter One - The Hollow at Dawn

blocks.source_text: Mira woke before the Turning, while the valley still slept.
blocks.clean_text: Mira woke before the Turning, while the valley still slept.

sentences.text: Mira woke before the Turning, while the valley still slept.

annotations.narrative_note: Opening block introduces Mira and the recurring time motif.

blocks.source_text: The girl had not slept; she watched the valley breathe.
blocks.clean_text: The girl had not slept; she watched the valley breathe.

sentences.text: The girl had not slept; she watched the valley breathe.

annotations.narrative_note: Alias mention demonstrates entity consistency across non-canonical surfaces.

blocks.source_text: "Clockkeeper," Mira called, "why does the dawn come so slowly here?"
blocks.clean_text: "Clockkeeper," Mira called, "why does the dawn come so slowly here?"

sentences.text: "Clockkeeper," Mira called, "why does the dawn come so slowly here?"

blocks.source_text: "The Turning is not slow," the Clockkeeper said, turning his hourglass. "You are simply early."
blocks.clean_text: "The Turning is not slow," the Clockkeeper said, turning his hourglass. "You are simply early."

sentences.text: "The Turning is not slow," the Clockkeeper said, turning his hourglass. "You are simply early."

annotations.implicit_meaning: The Clockkeeper corrects Mira gently while implying she has misread time.
annotations.narrative_note: Term-heavy dialogue with glossary and entity constraints.

blocks.source_text: Beyond them the Hollow opened like a held breath.
blocks.clean_text: Beyond them the Hollow opened like a held breath.

sentences.text: Beyond them the Hollow opened like a held breath.

annotations.implicit_meaning: The place is presented as if it were alive and waiting.
annotations.narrative_note: Place entity plus figurative setting description.

blocks.source_text: An old inscription on the dial marked the passage of time.
blocks.clean_text: An old inscription on the dial marked the passage of time.

sentences.text: An old inscription on the dial marked the passage of time.

annotations.narrative_note: The dial acts as a quiet marker of time.

blocks.source_text: When the second Turning came, Mira was ready.
blocks.clean_text: When the second Turning came, Mira was ready.

sentences.text: When the second Turning came, Mira was ready.

annotations.narrative_note: Second chapter opening shows state change from uncertainty to readiness.

blocks.source_text: "Then walk with me," said the old man, "and watch the sand fall."
blocks.clean_text: "Then walk with me," said the old man, "and watch the sand fall."

sentences.text: "Then walk with me," said the old man, "and watch the sand fall."

annotations.narrative_note: Alias mention for the Clockkeeper demonstrates entity resolution.

blocks.source_text: They climbed the dial-path together, counting nothing at all.
blocks.clean_text: They climbed the dial-path together, counting nothing at all.

sentences.text: They climbed the dial-path together, counting nothing at all.

annotations.implicit_meaning: The refusal to count suggests trust rather than measurement.
annotations.narrative_note: Provenance shows an example of a corrected extraction block.

blocks.source_text: Rule of the Hollow: never count the final grain.
blocks.clean_text: Rule of the Hollow: never count the final grain.

sentences.text: Rule of the Hollow: never count the final grain.

annotations.narrative_note: Rule-like prose is represented as a paragraph in the literary schema.

blocks.source_text: The hourglass emptied, and the valley woke.
blocks.clean_text: The hourglass emptied, and the valley woke.

sentences.text: The hourglass emptied, and the valley woke.

annotations.narrative_note: Term occurrence with a recurring awakening motif.

blocks.source_text: Mira did not look back at the Turning.
blocks.clean_text: Mira did not look back at the Turning.

sentences.text: Mira did not look back at the Turning.

annotations.implicit_meaning: Mira accepts the change without seeking reassurance.
annotations.narrative_note: Closing block repeats the central term and main character.
